stories.title: Spurs 127, Bucks 95 — Wembanyama Dominates, Milwaukee Eliminated

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
SPURS 127. BUCKS 95. 🔥

Milwaukee is OFFICIALLY eliminated from playoff contention.

Wembanyama led the way in a 32-point demolition — San Antonio is 54-18.

The Bucks' season is OVER.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #Bucks

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Bucks went from 2021 champions to watching the playoffs on TV. 👀

Milwaukee needed Giannis healthy, a real second star, and a plan.

Meanwhile Wemby just handed them a 32-point beatdown.

The West has a new king — and he's 22 years old.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBA

stories.title: Jokic 33/15/12 on 13-of-16 — 4th Straight Triple-Double, Nuggets Win

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Nikola Jokic last night: 33 pts. 15 reb. 12 ast. On 13-of-16. 🤯

That's his 4th straight triple-double.

Over 4 games he's averaging 25.3/16.8/15.5.

You are watching something special in Denver right now.

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets #Jokic

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
13-for-16. 33 pts. A triple-double. 👀

This is Jokic at a level the center position has NEVER seen.

4 straight triple-doubles. Averages of 28/12.6/10.6 on the season.

Hot take: greatest statistical season from a big man in NBA history.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #Nuggets

stories.title: LeBron's Pass-First Evolution — Lakers Go 12-1 in March
stories.angle: LeBron reduced scoring role, Lakers 12-1 stretch

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
LeBron has attempted 15 or fewer shots in 9 straight games. 👑

Longest such stretch of his 23-year career.

The result? Lakers are 12-1. Luka averaging 37.1 PPG in March.

Most impressive thing LeBron has done in years — and he's barely scoring.

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #LeBron

stories.title: Embiid-George Steady 76ers — Beat Hornets, Hold No. 7 East Seed
stories.angle: 76ers hold No. 7 seed; East Play-In four-team race

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Embiid and George delivered again. 🏀

76ers beat Charlotte to hold No. 7 in the East at 39-33.

The East Play-In: Sixers, Hornets, Magic, and Heat all within 2 games.

This four-team race is the most exciting finish in basketball right now.

#HoopHeroes #Sixers #NBA

stories.title: Anthony Edwards Out 1-2 Weeks With Knee — Wolves Seeding at Risk
stories.angle: Edwards injury, Minnesota seeding battle vs. Denver

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
INJURY ALERT: Anthony Edwards is OUT for 1-2 weeks. 😬

Right knee inflammation. Re-eval in 1-2 weeks.

Minnesota is 44-28, tied with Denver for No. 4-5 in the West.

With 14 games left — bad timing for the Wolves. 🐺

#HoopHeroes #Timberwolves #NBA

stories.title: Bronny James Drops 26/7/5 in G League Win — LeBron Reacts
stories.angle: Bronny G League performance + LeBron proud-dad moment

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Bronny James last night: 26 pts. 7 reb. 5 ast. 🔥

South Bay Lakers win 140-132 in the G League.

LeBron saw the box score and lost it on social.

The father-son story is getting better by the month. 👑

#HoopHeroes #BronnyJames #LeBron
